subject: trans cranial magnetic stimulation for our daughter
body:
Dear Jefftey 
Me and my wife want to try trans cranial magnetic stimulation this summer we feel may be this might be the thing that can help her as we managed to heal her stomach completely and now she is healthy again but still not speaking .
There are two places who preform this one at Harvard medical center 
And the other by Drjeff Bradstreet at his Clinic at new port beach
Can you please help us to find out which one is better to preform this and can you get us appointments as I heard its difficult 
Yours 
Istiqama and sultan 
God bless you my friend 

1- Harvard Medical center 

http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DBBDiGvupFw&sns=em

2- brain treatment center 
Dr Bradstreet 

http://www.autismcompanion.com/visit-to-the-brain-treatment-center-in-newport-beach-california/

http://braintreatmentcenter.asia/english/autism/
